faults.name: Positive feedback missing
faults.why: Without positive feedback the circuit has no hysteresis and chatters near the threshold.
faults.verification_test: Sweep Vin slowly and record separate rising/falling thresholds.

faults.name: Threshold divider wrong value
faults.why: Swapped divider values move the switching thresholds away from the lab expectation.
faults.verification_test: Measure the rising and falling switching points.

faults.name: Input exceeds allowed comparator range
faults.why: Driving beyond the op-amp/comparator input range causes confusing output states.
faults.verification_test: Measure the input peak and compare it with the allowed common-mode range.
faults.fix_recipe: Scale or clamp the input before the Schmitt trigger.
